since_last: 65% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.08%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.99% · BTC -4.59% · Gold -2.76% · Nasdaq100 +2.28%. 65% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.08%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.08%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.18%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +12.06%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +12.06%, SMR +10.93%, INTC +10.65%, SMCI +9.54%, KLAC +8.59%. Laggards: SPCX -8.47%, INOD -7.45%, IBM -4.82%, WDAY -3.06%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -8.47% at $175.57
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -8.47% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
